_comment: Tier-2: 4C 2026.3.0-dev rejects an invalid value for PROBLEMTYPE inside PROBLEM TYPE section. The error from core/io/src/4C_io_input_spec_builders.cpp says 'Could not match this input' and echoes the offending YAML block. Useful for an agent that has to compose YAML — catches mis-typed problem types early. Verified empirically 2026-06-01.
